description: Technical Mechanical Ethics registry for EthicBit / CEMU.

rules.description: All technical builds affecting critical outputs must be reproducible from preserved source, configuration, and dependency state.
rules.justification: Sin reproducibilidad técnica no existe verificación independiente fiable ni cierre de auditoría defendible.

rules.description: All critical technical transformations must be fully traceable across inputs, intermediate states, and outputs.
rules.justification: Sin trazabilidad técnica completa no es posible reconstruir causalidad, aislar fallos ni defender resultados ante auditoría.

rules.description: All technical verification procedures must preserve explainable failure reasons and actionable remediation paths.
rules.justification: Las fallas técnicas opacas impiden remediación disciplinada y degradan la capacidad de auditoría posterior.
